title: Paradigm Meta Configuration
description: Shared configuration for a paradigm specification set, including FST metadata, localization, shared tag variables, and tag filtering.

$schema.description: URI of this JSON Schema for validation.

version.description: Version of this paradigm specification set.

tagPrefix.description: String that precedes each tag in readings and tag sequences (e.g. "+", "<").

tagSuffix.description: Optional string that follows each tag (e.g. ">" for Apertium). If omitted, tags end at the next tagPrefix or end-of-string.

localization.description: Tag-to-label mappings for UI display. Keys are tags or tag sequences; values are objects mapping ISO 639 language codes to display strings.

additionalProperties.description: Localized labels for a tag, keyed by ISO 639 language code.

tagVariables.description: Shared template variables available to all paradigm files. Each variable maps to an ordered list of candidate tag values. Paradigm-level tagVariables with the same name take precedence.

excludeTags.description: Tag prefixes to exclude from paradigm generation. Readings containing these tags should be stripped or ignored when selecting paradigms.

tagVariableValues.description: Ordered list of candidate tag values. The first boundary-matching tag in the reading is used.
